Right at the end of the penninsula Access: Public.

Several wild plum trees in this location. Flavorful and tart fruit with high yield this year. Many liter the ground. Tart and flavorful. The trees near the parking lot ripen earlier, probably because they get more sun.

Wild Grapes. Creekside, about 30 yards upstream from Powder Horn Lodge. Across creek from parking area. Alot of them still there, but well past prime in December. Our experience is they taste great in October and early November, and not good in December. This
